item.title: MTAR Technologies Ltd Surges 7.27% to Day's High of Rs 6850 — Outperforms Sector by 7.64 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex gained a modest 0.45% on 13 May 2026, while MTAR Technologies Ltd surged 7.27%, touching a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs 6850. This 7.64-percentage-point outperformance over its Aerospace & Defense sector peers highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a broad market lift. Time: 6 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Energy Solutions Ltd Rallies 3.5% and Approaches Key Moving Averages — A Technical Test in Focus
item.description: The Sensex gained 0.45% on 13 May 2026, yet Adani Energy Solutions Ltd outperformed with a 3.5% rise, touching an intraday high of Rs 1320.75. This 3.5-percentage-point outperformance signals a stock-specific strength amid a market that remains below key moving averages, raising the question: is this surge a genuine breakout or a technical bounce within a mixed trend? Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Talbros Automotive Components Ltd Surges 7.16% to Day's High of Rs 337.3 — Outperforms Sector by 7.04 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex gained a modest 0.39% on 13 Jun 2026, but Talbros Automotive Components Ltd surged 7.16%, touching an intraday high of Rs 337.3. This 7.04 percentage-point outperformance over its sector highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a broad market move. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Enterprises Ltd Surges 3.07% to Day's High of Rs 2472.45 — Outperforms Sector by 0.46 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex rose 0.35% on 13 May 2026, yet Adani Enterprises Ltd outpaced both the benchmark and its sector peers with a 3.07% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 2472.45. This 0.46 percentage-point outperformance over the Diversified sector’s 2.43% advance signals a stock-specific strength rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts MTAR Technologies Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 6850
item.description: MTAR Technologies Ltd has surged to a fresh 52-week and all-time high of Rs 6850 on 13 May 2026, marking a remarkable rally from its 52-week low of Rs 1391. This extraordinary price momentum is underpinned by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and robust trading volumes, setting the stage for sustained market attention despite broader market softness. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: Shalibhadra Finance Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 73.1 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the second consecutive session, Shalibhadra Finance Ltd has declined, hitting a fresh 52-week low of Rs 73.1 on 13 May 2026. This latest drop extends the stock’s downward trajectory, which has now erased nearly half its value over the past year despite some positive financial signals. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Rajasthan Tube Manufacturing Co Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Rajasthan Tube Manufacturing Co Ltd’s stock price declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.12.35 on 13 May 2026, marking a significant downturn amid broader market fluctuations and sector-specific pressures. The stock’s recent performance reflects a continuation of negative momentum, with multiple technical and fundamental factors contributing to its current valuation. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts P. H. Capital Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 744
item.description: From a 52-week low of Rs 148.6 to a new peak of Rs 744, P. H. Capital Ltd has surged an impressive 285.99% over the past year, significantly outpacing the Sensex’s decline of 8.09%. This remarkable rally culminated in the stock hitting its all-time high today, driven predominantly by a strong alignment of technical indicators across multiple timeframes. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Vodafone Idea Ltd. to 52-Week High of Rs 12.8
item.description: From a 52-week low of Rs 6.12 to a fresh high of Rs 12.8, Vodafone Idea Ltd. has surged by over 83% in the past year, significantly outpacing the Sensex’s decline of 8.13%. This remarkable price momentum culminated in the stock touching its 52-week high on 13 May 2026, driven by a confluence of strong technical signals and sustained buying interest. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Coromandel International Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 1818 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the fifth consecutive session, Coromandel International Ltd closed lower, breaching its 52-week low at Rs 1818 on 13 May 2026, marking a 2.93% intraday decline and underperforming its sector by 2.63% amid a broader market that showed modest recovery. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Daikaffil Chemicals India Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 33 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the third consecutive session, Daikaffil Chemicals India Ltd has seen its share price decline, culminating in a fresh 52-week low of Rs 33 on 13 May 2026. This marks a steep drop of over 78% in the past year, sharply underperforming the broader Sensex, which has declined by just 8.13% over the same period. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Advance Petrochemicals Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 320.75
item.description: With a remarkable 126.12% gain over the past 18 trading days, Advance Petrochemicals Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 320.75 on 13 Jun 2026, showcasing a powerful momentum that has outpaced the broader market and its sector peers. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Rossell Techsys Ltd Surges 8.56% to Day's High of Rs 905 — Outperforms Sector by 6.9 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex remained flat on 13 May 2026, while Rossell Techsys Ltd surged 8.56% to touch an intraday high of Rs 905, outperforming its Aerospace & Defense sector by nearly 7 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a subdued broader market. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Deccan Gold Mines Ltd Surges 8.54% to Day's High of Rs 126.5 — Outperforms Sector by 6.26 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex remained flat on 13 May 2026, while Deccan Gold Mines Ltd surged 8.54%, reaching an intraday high of Rs 126.5. This 6.26 percentage-point outperformance over its Non - Ferrous Metals sector peers highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a broad market move. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Power Grid Corporation of India Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Power Grid Corporation of India Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 296.55, reflecting a 3.18% drop as the stock faced significant price pressure amid broader market headwinds and sector underperformance. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Vodafone Idea Ltd. Rallies 7.49% Surpassing All Major Moving Averages — Momentum Gains Steam
item.description: The Sensex remained flat on 13 May 2026, yet Vodafone Idea Ltd. surged 7.49%, outperforming its Telecom - Services sector by over 4 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a clear stock-specific event, signalling a strong technical move rather than a market-wide rally. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: MTAR Technologies Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 6,823 as Momentum Accelerates
item.description: MTAR Technologies Ltd, a key player in the Aerospace & Defense sector, has reached an all-time high stock price of Rs 6,823.10 on 13 May 2026, marking a significant milestone in its market journey. This achievement reflects the company’s strong financial results, sustained growth, and favourable market dynamics over recent periods. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: P. H. Capital Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 744 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Extending its remarkable rally, P. H. Capital Ltd touched a fresh all-time high of Rs 744 on 13 May 2026, continuing a multi-year surge that has vastly outpaced the broader market. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Dr Reddys Laboratories Ltd Opens 3.93% Lower in Sharp Gap Down as Technicals Point to Mixed Signals
item.description: Dr Reddys Laboratories Ltd commenced trading on 13 May 2026 with a pronounced gap down, opening at a price reflecting a 3.93% decline from the previous close. This weak start follows a series of consecutive losses and reflects ongoing market apprehensions surrounding the pharmaceutical giant. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Baazar Style Retail Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 426.85
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 426.85 on 13 Jun 2026, Baazar Style Retail Ltd has marked a new 52-week high, reflecting a year-long rally that has outpaced the broader market by over 33 percentage points. This milestone underscores the stock’s strong price momentum and a confluence of technical indicators signalling sustained upward movement. Time: 42 minutes ago
